hypothesis: If a hybrid Transformer-Mamba encoder-decoder model is pre-trained jointly on multiple molecular representation modalities (SMILES, SELFIES, InChI, IUPAC, molecular formula, polymer, and electrolyte notations) using aligned multimodal objectives, then it will learn a unified latent space that enables accurate cross-modal molecular translation and superior property prediction across diverse chemical domains compared to single-modality or unimodal approaches, because shared multimodal pre-training captures complementary structural and semantic information encoded differently across molecular representation systems.
